commit_message: feat: add configurable RSS/Atom feed options
files_changed:
M	site.config.ts
A	src/app/feed.atom/route.ts
M	src/app/feed.xml/route.ts
M	src/components/RssFeedWidget.tsx
A	src/lib/feed-utils.ts

_extraction.source: upstream commit 65a56242 via gh api repos/hutusi/amytis/commits/<sha>.diff
_extraction.note: Original tool_replay produced duplicate 'feed:' key in site.config.ts because the session contained two Edits with identical old_string (`flows: { recentCount: 5, },`): Edit #1 (msg 40) added `feed:{...content: 'excerpt'...}` and was REJECTED by the user ("I think full can be default"); Edit #2 (msg 46) replaced the same old_string with `feed:{...content: 'full'...}` and was accepted. The replayer concatenated both insertions, yielding two consecutive `feed:{...}` blocks (TS1117: object literal cannot have multiple properties with the same name). Verified that bun -e import of the broken file fails — which would cause F2P_FEED_CONFIG gate (test.sh:41) to FAIL. Replaced patch with the upstream commit's diff (PR's gold-standard), which matches the session's final intended state. Verified `git apply --check` against base 61f6bd2a; verified tsc reports no TS1117 errors; mapped to all 5 F2P gates in tests/test.sh.

verification: Single 'feed: {' block in site.config.ts after apply
tsc --noEmit no longer reports TS1117 (only unrelated process/node-types errors present in base)
Patch maps to all 5 F2P gates: F2P_FEED_CONFIG, F2P_FEED_UTILS, F2P_ATOM_ROUTE, F2P_RSS_USES_CONFIG, F2P_WIDGET_FORMAT
Confirmed via session msg 41-46 that Edit #1 was user-rejected and only Edit #2's content survived
